data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a dry northeast monsoon, the weather will be fine with relatively large temperature difference between day and night over southern China today. A strong replenishment of the monsoon will affect the coast of Guangdong on Friday to early Saturday. With the monsoon moderating, temperatures will rise gradually over the region early to midweek next week. It will be warm during the day. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Nuri will move eastwards across the western North Pacific and weaken gradually today and tomorrow.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260312","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"Northeast force 2 to 3, becoming east force 5 at night.","forecastWeather":"Fine.
